init.exists: ruleform.yaml already exists. Use --force to overwrite.
init.success: ✓ Created ruleform.yaml with {{ruleCount}} rules and {{providerCount}} providers
init.hint: Next: edit ruleform.yaml, then run `ruleform plan`

plan.title: RuleForm Plan — {{fileCount}} files across {{providerCount}} providers
plan.summary: Plan: {{created}} to create, {{updated}} to update, {{unchanged}} unchanged.
plan.noChanges: No changes. Your context files are up to date.

apply.title: RuleForm Apply — writing {{count}} files
apply.success: Apply complete! {{count}} files written across {{providerCount}} providers.
apply.noChanges: Nothing to apply. Everything is up to date.

errors.configNotFound: No ruleform.yaml found. Run `ruleform init` to create one.
errors.missingExtends: Rule "{{rule}}" extends "{{parent}}" which does not exist.
errors.missingVariable: Variable "{{name}}" referenced in rule "{{rule}}" is not defined.
